title: Cloak (Scroll)
description: Cloak is a technology stack built using Scroll's rollup technology. It is an L3 validium that proves every transaction using zkEVM technology, ensuring that state can only be updated according to the protocol rules. It achieves confidentiality via access control techniques. This allows only chain operators and regulators to access the data. Users can freely access their own accounts, but they cannot query other users' data.
